# Phase 33 Plan 01 — Radius/Spacing Audit

**Date:** 2026-04-22
**Generated by:** Plan 33-01 Task 3
**Consumer:** Plan 33-03 (spacing & hook)

Plan 01 canonicalized `--radius-lg: 6px → 8px` and deliberately DROPPED the 12px value (`--spacing-md`) from the Phase 33 token set per checker D5. Tailwind v4's default `gap-3`/`p-3`/`m-3` utilities still compile to 12px — this audit lists all impact sites so Plan 03 can remap.

---

## --radius-lg: 6px → 8px impact

Search: `rg -n "rounded-lg" src/` across `src/components/`, `src/canvas/`, `src/three/`.

**Result: ZERO matches.**

No source file in `src/components/`, `src/canvas/`, or `src/three/` uses the Tailwind `rounded-lg` utility. The canonicalization from 6px → 8px has no component-level regression surface. The new `--radius-lg: 8px` value is available via `var(--radius-lg)` / `rounded-lg` for future Wave 2/3 components (per UI-SPEC: modals, floating toolbar, gesture chip).

| File:Line | Current | Accept Change? | Notes |
|-----------|---------|----------------|-------|
| _(none found)_ | — | — | No existing `rounded-lg` usage in src/ — canonicalization is safe. |

---

## 12px spacing sites in D-35 target files (remap list for Plan 03)

Search: `rg -n "\b(p-3\|m-3\|gap-3\|px-3\|py-3\|mx-3\|my-3\|pt-3\|pb-3\|pl-3\|pr-3\|mt-3\|mb-3\|ml-3\|mr-3)\b"` in the 4 D-35 target files.

### Toolbar.tsx (5 matches)

| File:Line | Current | Remap | Rationale |
|-----------|---------|-------|-----------|
| `src/components/Toolbar.tsx:51` | `px-3 py-1` (tab-style control) | `px-2 py-1` (8px/4px) | Tighten to canonical `--spacing-sm`; tab controls read compact in toolbar row |
| `src/components/Toolbar.tsx:64` | `px-3 py-1` (tab-style control) | `px-2 py-1` (8px/4px) | Same as :51 — consistent tab affordance |
| `src/components/Toolbar.tsx:84` | `px-3 py-1 mr-6` (button w/ right margin) | `px-2 py-1 mr-6` (8px/4px) | Tighten horizontal pad to match sibling tabs |
| `src/components/Toolbar.tsx:100` | `gap-3` (button group) | `gap-2` (8px) | Button group gap → canonical `--spacing-sm`; was Tailwind default 12px |
| `src/components/Toolbar.tsx:133` | `px-3 py-1` (action button "Export PNG"-style) | `px-4 py-1` (16px/4px) | Primary action buttons deserve more horizontal weight → `--spacing-lg`; visually separates from tab-control neighbors |

### Sidebar.tsx (1 match)

| File:Line | Current | Remap | Rationale |
|-----------|---------|-------|-----------|
| `src/components/Sidebar.tsx:59` | `pt-3 pb-2` (section header top/bottom padding) | `pt-2 pb-2` (8px/8px) | Tighten top pad to canonical `--spacing-sm`; unifies section header vertical rhythm |

### PropertiesPanel.tsx

**Result: ZERO matches.** No `p-3`/`m-3`/`gap-3` (or any axis variant) in PropertiesPanel.tsx. Already compliant.

### RoomSettings.tsx

**Result: ZERO matches.** Already compliant.

---

## Summary

- **rounded-lg usage:** 0 sites → no regression from `--radius-lg: 6px → 8px` canonicalization.
- **12px remap sites:** 6 total (5 in Toolbar.tsx, 1 in Sidebar.tsx).
- **D-35 compliance status after Plan 01:**
  - Toolbar.tsx: 5 remaps queued for Plan 03
  - Sidebar.tsx: 1 remap queued for Plan 03
  - PropertiesPanel.tsx: already compliant
  - RoomSettings.tsx: already compliant

No source files were modified by this audit — it is read-only analysis. Plan 03 consumes this remap list to execute the spacing migration.

**Arbitrary-value note:** Plan 03 will also need to sweep the `text-[10px]` / `text-[11px]` arbitrary font-size values (widespread in Toolbar/Sidebar) in favor of the new `--text-sm` (11px) token exposed as `text-sm`. That is out of scope for this audit (which targets only `rounded-lg` + 12px-spacing per the plan's Task 3 contract); Plan 03's plan body owns it.
